# Test: commas in titles — officially unsupported (commas are the field delimiter).
# bash read puts the remainder of the line into the last field, so clips still
# extract, but titles may be malformed. Users should use dashes instead of commas.
# start-timestamp, end-timestamp, video-name
0:10,0:40,Title with a comma, and extra text
0:50,1:20,Another clip, with multiple, commas
1:30,2:00,Normal Title
